name: omc-custom-worker-with-pi
description: Add pi CLI workers (zai, openai, any provider) to oh-my-claudecode teams alongside claude, codex, and gemini

plugins.name: omc-custom-worker-with-pi
plugins.description: Extend oh-my-claudecode teams with pi CLI workers. Use any pi-supported LLM provider (zai, openai, gemini, etc.) as a team worker alongside native claude, codex, and gemini workers.
